== Notes for [[Item:Q3031|Q3031]] ==

You

→(he is my 11th GF Dr. Ana Maria Marina Zaldivar y Zaydin your mother → Dr. Manuel Ramon Zaldivar y Cordero her father → Miguel Alvaro Zaldivar y Sanchez Pereira his father → Micaela Sanchez Pereira y Recio his mother → Ignacio Sánchez Pereira y Miranda her father → Luis Sánchez Pereira y Miranda his father → José Sánchez Pereira y Zayas Bazán his father → Beatriz Zayas-Bazán y de la Torre his mother → Fernando Zayas-Bazán y Barreda her father → Captain Francisco de Zayas-Bazán y Roxas his father → Captain Lope de Zayas y Bazán his father → Brianda de Bazán y Castro his mother → Hernando de Castro Maluenda her father;

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051ADABB9031EFBBFA9822EF79916C9F1B
geni:6000000001147683384


[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
